ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squad playing in the match */,
  "opp_squad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing squad */,
  "period" INTEGER /* The period during which the statistics were recorded */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee assigned to the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opp_squad_id FOREIGN KEY ("opp_squad_id") REFERENCES teams ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_squad_id FOREIGN KEY ("squad_id") REFERENCES teams ("squad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match associated with these statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player for whom the statistics are recorded */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes the player was on the field */,
  "bad_hands" INTEGER /* Number of bad hands in the match */,
  "bad_passes" INTEGER /* Number of bad passes in the match */,
  "blocked" INTEGER /* Number of blocked plays */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made */,
  "breaks" INTEGER /* Number of breaks made */,
  "centre_pass_receives" INTEGER /* Number of centre pass receives */,
  "contact_penalties" INTEGER /* Number of contact penalties */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds */,
  "deflections" INTEGER /* Number of deflections */,
  "disposals" INTEGER /* Total disposals made */,
  "feeds" INTEGER /* Number of feeds made */,
  "gain" INTEGER /* Total gains made */,
  "goal_assists" INTEGER /* Number of goal assists */,
  "goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Total goal attempts */,
  "goal_misses" INTEGER /* Number of goal misses */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored */,
  "goals_from_centre_pass" INTEGER /* Goals scored from centre passes */,
  "goals_from_gain" INTEGER /* Goals scored from gains */,
  "goals_from_turnovers" INTEGER /* Goals scored from turnovers */,
  "intercepts" INTEGER /* Number of intercepts */,
  "obstruction_penalties" INTEGER /* Number of obstruction penalties */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offsides */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Total passes made */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties given */,
  "pickups" INTEGER /* Number of pickups */,
  "possessions" INTEGER /* Total possessions */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds */,
  "time_in_possession" INTEGER /* Total time in possession */,
  "toss_up_win" REAL /* Number of toss-up wins */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "pace_per_60" REAL /* Pace per 60 minutes */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating for the match */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating for the match */,
  "net_rating" TEXT /* Net rating calculated from offensive and defensive performance */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Any injuries sustained during the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "shots_off_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots off goal */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made (if applicable, e.g., for goalkeepers) */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks taken */,
  "free_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks taken */,
  "penalties_taken" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (if applicable, e.g., for goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team is competing */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for platform access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being viewed or analyzed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view statistics, generate report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
